name: The Wonder Flower!
description:
I took every Wonder Effect, and even some custom ones for this.

Go ahead, get eaten by a giant fish, or crushed by a large, golden statue of Bowser, maybe even go be a spiky ball. Do whatever the hell you want.

"Wonderful!"

Sorry for being gone for so long. As an apology, I made 15 bots and I'm releasing them in the span of 3 days. This is the first set of bots I'm making, and were starting with the hardest bot it ever took me to make: The Wonder Flower.

Art used is made by Pufffyyy on DeviantArt.
creator: Helper41111
